title: HTI Toys Squidgy Squishy Stretchy Poop Stress Reliever For Kids & Adults
features: REDUCE ANXIETY & STRESS - The squeezy poo is great for children and adults alike. A great form of stress relief and also to have fun at the same time. Stretch it! Squeeze it! Squash it!

GREAT SENSORY PACIFYING TOY FOR SPECIAL NEEDS - Our squishy poop would make a great gift for children. Alternatively this is good for strengthening hand, wrist, forearm muscles, and ideal for rehabilition and physical therapy.

STRETCH & SQUASH AT YOUR DESK - Great for the desk fidget-er. Having a stressful day at work? Why not get one of our squeezy poops and squeeze and squash your stresses away. Take your anger out on this toy, not your colleagues.
PRODUCT SPECIFICATIONS - Approximately 14cm long, 60cm when stretched. Made from a soft rubber material which is very elastic. Suitable for children ages 3 years old and up.

CE MARKED UK SELLER SAFE TO PLAY - It's made from safe, non-toxic ingredients and will not stick to your hands. All our products are tested to the highest UK CE standard to ensure the safety of your children, please be careful when comparing with others.
description: The incredibly addictive stretchy poop is irresistible! You wont be able to put it down! Fool your friends with this realistic looking stool and give them a huge shock when they realise its made of a soft, squeezy rubber material!
